## CssLoaderModules interface

The [cssLoader.modules](./rspeedy.cssloadermodules.md) option enables/disables the CSS Modules specification and setup basic behavior.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface CssLoaderModules 
```

</td><td>


</td><td>

boolean \| RegExp \| ((filename: string) =&gt; boolean) \| undefined


</td><td>
